notes: Targeted collection for robust contact-rich manipulation and related theory/control for IROS 2026 submission.

queries.name: contact_rich_manipulation
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:"contact-rich manipulation" OR all:"contact rich manipulation" OR all:"robot manipulation")

queries.name: robust_safe_planning_control
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:"robust mpc" OR all:"safe planning" OR all:"conformal prediction" OR all:"distribution shift")

queries.name: imitation_policy_history
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:"imitation learning" OR all:"policy learning" OR all:"history conditioning" OR all:"long horizon")

queries.name: sim2real_generalization
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:sim2real OR all:"domain shift" OR all:generalization OR all:robustness)

queries.name: embodied_vla_transfer
queries.arxiv_query: cat:cs.RO AND (all:"vision-language-action" OR all:"cross-embodiment" OR all:"few-shot transfer")
